$comment: Bundled DCAT controlled value lists for OpenCatalogi national/EU open-data federation (DCAT-NPF-002/003). Reference data only — the render-time resolver is lib/Service/DcatVocabularyService.php, the authoritative source. HVD categories from the EU high-value-dataset-category authority (Reg (EU) 2023/138); themes from the EU MDR data-theme authority. No real municipality data.
